description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and a symmetrical facade, featuring multiple white-framed windows on each level. The front yard is enclosed by a wooden fence and gate, with a paved walkway leading to a double-door entry. The left side of the property includes a small green lawn and a patio area with outdoor furniture. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and uninterrupted brickwork. The house appears to have a modern, utilitarian design with minimal decorative elements. The overall structure is solid and robust, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A two-story brick house with a flat roof, symmetrical white-framed windows, and a fenced front yard with a paved walkway and double-door entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with double doors, fenced yard, green lawn, and two trash bins.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wooden fence, patio area with outdoor furniture, and a single window on the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain brick wall with six symmetrically arranged windows and no visible entry.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the fenced yard, green lawn, and two windows on the side wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with no porch, accessed via a paved walkway and enclosed by a wooden fence and gate.
